metadata.description: Custom skills marketplace — AWS security, architecture, and more

plugins.name: aws-secure-architecture
plugins.description: Design secure AWS architectures with defense-in-depth — private connectivity, egress control, multi-account security, and zero-trust patterns

plugins.name: technical-docs
plugins.description: Generate structured technical documentation — architecture docs, runbooks, ADRs, API docs, postmortems, and security reviews. Output is structured markdown with frontmatter, designed to feed into docx/pptx/pdf skills.

plugins.name: architecture-diagrams
plugins.description: Generate architecture and infrastructure diagrams in Mermaid, PlantUML, and Draw.io formats — flowcharts, sequence diagrams, cloud infrastructure diagrams with native AWS/Azure/GCP icons.

plugins.name: mac-expert
plugins.description: Apple macOS expert for configuring, diagnosing, fixing, and optimizing MacBooks and Macs. Covers system settings, shell config, networking, Homebrew, storage, security, performance, and troubleshooting.

plugins.name: jiralyzer
plugins.description: Jira ticket analytics — natural language queries, SQL generation, interactive charts

plugins.name: ai-sdlc
plugins.description: AI-SDLC: Automated software development lifecycle with Jira coordination. Plans projects, creates tickets, designs architecture, writes code, tests, reviews, and fixes bugs through coordinated agents.

plugins.name: session-handoff
plugins.description: Capture session progress and create structured handoff notes so the next session can resume without rediscovery.

plugins.name: csi-discovery
plugins.description: CSI Department discovery and documentation agent. Guides structured discovery of teams' systems, processes, tooling, and pain points. Creates Confluence forms, scans sources, enriches data, publishes structured output.
